_comment: Schema for World Cup Kits country data. Cowork outputs JSON matching this structure. Watcher converts to JS module.
id: string — kebab-case slug matching the filename (e.g. 'argentina')
name: string — display name (e.g. 'Argentina')
flagCode: string — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for flagcdn.com (e.g. 'ar'). Special: 'gb-eng', 'gb-sct', 'gb-wls', 'gb-nir'
confederation: string — one of: CONMEBOL / UEFA / CONCACAF / CAF / AFC / OFC
worldCups: number[] — years they qualified, 1930–2026. Include 2026 if the country participated.
bestResult: string — e.g. '3× World Champions' or 'Quarter-finalists' or 'Group Stage (1 appearance)'

stats.matches: number — total matches played (must equal W+D+L)
stats.draws: number — includes penalty shootout matches (count as D regardless of who advances)

facts.label: string — ALL CAPS, 2-4 words (e.g. 'THE ALBICELESTE')
facts.story: string — 3-5 sentences. Magazine voice. Specific names, dates, moments. NOT encyclopedia prose. Tell a story.

YEAR.result: string — exactly one of: Champions / Runners-up / 3rd Place / 4th Place / Semi-final / Quarter-final / Round of 16 / 2nd Round / Group Stage
YEAR.headline: string — 3-6 evocative words capturing the year (e.g. 'The Hand of God'). Null if nothing iconic.

annotations.label: string — 2-4 words ALL CAPS (e.g. 'THE HAND OF GOD')
annotations.story: string — 30-60 words. One specific moment. Magazine voice. No Wikipedia prose.

YEAR.homeColors: string — describe the home kit colors (e.g. 'light blue and white stripes')
YEAR.awayColors: string or null — describe the away kit if used or notable
YEAR.image: string or null — direct Wikimedia Commons image URL with a CC license. Must be an actual URL you verified. Null if not found.

imageCredit.player: string or null — player name visible in the image
imageCredit.game: string or null — match description and license (e.g. 'Argentina vs France, 1978 Final — CC BY-SA 3.0 / Wikimedia Commons')

matches.round: string — e.g. 'Group Stage', 'Quarter-final', 'Final', 'Round of 16', '2nd Round', '3rd Place'
matches.opponent: string — use the name as they were known at the time (e.g. 'West Germany', not 'Germany')
matches.score: string — use en-dash: '2–1'. For pens add: '1–1 (4–2 pens)'. Never hyphen.
matches.result: string — W / D / L. Penalty shootout = D always.
matches.scorers: string or null — goal scorers with minute, e.g. 'Pelé 18\', Jairzinho 71\''. Own goals: 'Mazzola OG 45\''. Null if not found.

_rules: Set any field to null if you cannot verify it. Never invent a score, stat, or scorer.
scorers: list this country's scorers only — not the opponent's. Format: 'Surname Minute\'' e.g. 'Pelé 18\', Vavá 68\''. Own goals: 'Surname OG Minute\''. Null if unknown.
Penalty shootouts always count as D in the result field.
stats.matches must equal stats.wins + stats.draws + stats.losses — verify this.
worldCups must only include years 1930–2022. No 2026.
Writing must be magazine voice: specific, vivid, surprising. Not Wikipedia.
Image URLs must be real Wikimedia Commons URLs you have verified. Null is better than a broken link.
opponent names: use historical names — 'West Germany' not 'Germany' (pre-1990), 'Soviet Union' not 'Russia', 'Yugoslavia' not 'Serbia', 'Zaire' not 'DR Congo', 'Czechoslovakia' not 'Czech Republic'
